description_long: This is a large, modern two-story house with a striking geometric design, featuring a mix of black and white exterior walls accented by natural wood elements. The front facade includes a driveway leading to a covered carport, a landscaped entryway with tall hedges, and a prominent balcony above the main entrance. The rear of the house opens to a spacious patio area with a swimming pool, surrounded by lush greenery and palm trees. Large windows and glass doors are distributed asymmetrically, allowing for ample natural light and views of the outdoor spaces. The flat roof and clean lines emphasize the contemporary architectural style, while the use of different textures and materials adds visual interest. The property is enclosed by a low fence and is complemented by manicured landscaping on all sides.
description: A modern, two-story house with black and white facades, wood accents, large windows, a driveway, and a backyard pool, surrounded by lush landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, carport, main entrance, balcony, and tall hedges flanking the entry.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the white and wood exterior, flat roof, and landscaped side yard with trees.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring the large glass doors, backyard swimming pool, patio, and surrounding greenery.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with black exterior walls, visible pool area, and landscaped garden.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a covered porch, wide steps, glass door, and flanked by tall hedges and a balcony above
